title: Elementary Japanese  (JAPN 1411)
description: (3;2) Grammar and phonetics; reading, composition and oral-aural practice.

title: Elementary Japanese  (JAPN 1412)
description: (3;2) Grammar and phonetics; reading, composition and oral-aural practice.

title: Japanese Society Today
description: Exploration of contemporary Japanese society through readings and discussions.

title: Business Japanese
description: Introduction to Japanese business culture and development of appropriate advanced language skills.
prerequisites: 9 hours of advanced Japanese or consent of department.

title: Special Problems
prerequisites: Consent of department. May be repeated for credit.

title: Japanese Extensive Reading
description: Enhance reading proficiency and other skills through cultural materials.

title: Building Japanese Fluency and Listening Skills
description: Improvement of fluency and listening skills to aid in transition from intermediate to advanced Japanese. Promotion of critical thinking in discussions on issues in diversity, equity, and inclusion in Japan is enhanced with a drama series for students’ fluency development.

title: Advanced Japanese II
description: Advanced listening, speaking, reading, writing and grammar. Topics include Japanese society, culture, history and intercultural communications.

title: Intermediate Japanese  (JAPN 2312)
description: Grammar, composition, oral-aural practice and readings.

title: Advanced Japanese IV
description: Continuation of advanced listening, speaking, reading, writing and grammar. Topics may include Japanese arts, culture, history and politics.
prerequisites: 9 hours of advanced Japanese or consent of department.

title: Intermediate Japanese  (JAPN 2311)
description: Grammar, composition, oral-aural practice and readings.

title: Advanced Japanese I
description: Advanced listening, speaking, reading, writing and grammar. Topics include Japanese society, culture, history and intercultural communications.
